pi_items.metadata_value: POS System Rollout - Bay Area Retailers
pi_items.verified_value: POS System Rollout - Bay Area Retailers

privileged_info_summary: The task targets three specific Odoo CRM opportunities with exact names verified in both setup and verification code: (1) Cloud Migration Assessment - GlobalTech Solutions with expected revenue $75,000 and 10% probability, (2) POS System Rollout - Bay Area Retailers with expected revenue $42,000 and 5% probability, and (3) Data Analytics Platform - Meridian Corp with expected revenue $120,000 and 15% probability. All three opportunities are synthetically created via Odoo XML-RPC API during task setup in the 'New' pipeline stage, marked as stale with descriptions indicating 3+ months of inactivity or competitor/budget-related reasons for dormancy. The task requires archiving these by setting their active status to False without modifying any other opportunities in the pipeline.
